no: DEPRECATED by author — use ZS_Consumables instead. Adds 12 weapon oils (elemental, arcane, poison, alignment-based) distributed to stores and NPCs. Oils cannot stack with each other

conflicts.reason: ZS_Consumables supersedes ZS_WeaponOils. The oils component is taken directly from the deprecated mod. Use one or the other

sum: A WeiDu mod that introduces weapon oils to BGEE, BG2EE and EET, distributing them to various stores throughout the games

co.n: Install oils and insert them into the world
co.no: Adds weapon oils and distributes to stores/NPCs by class and alignment. Deprecated — ZS_Consumables supersedes this
